name: Toughness
description: You can withstand more punishment than most. Increase your maximum Hit Points by an amount equal to your level. The DC of recovery checks is 9 + your dying value.

name: Fleet
description: You move more quickly than is normal for your ancestry. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

name: Incredible Initiative
description: You react more quickly than others can. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls.

name: Shield Block
trigger: You have a shield raised and take physical damage.
description: You snap your shield in place to deflect a blow. Your shield prevents damage up to its Hardness, reducing both the damage you take and its own Hit Points by that amount.

name: Armor Proficiency
description: You become trained in light armor. If you're already trained in light armor, you become trained in medium armor. If you're already trained in medium armor, you become trained in heavy armor.

name: Weapon Proficiency
description: You become trained in all simple weapons. If you're already trained in all simple weapons, you become trained in all martial weapons.

name: Diehard
description: It takes more to kill you than it does most. You die from the dying condition at dying 5 instead of dying 4.

name: Fast Recovery
description: Your body quickly bounces back from afflictions. Each time you succeed at a Fortitude save against an ongoing disease or poison, the affliction's stage decreases by 2 instead of 1.

name: Feather Step
description: You step carefully and quickly. You can Step into difficult terrain.

name: Multilingual
description: You easily pick up new languages. You learn two new languages.

name: Skill Training
description: You become trained in a skill of your choice.

name: Adopted Ancestry
description: You fully embrace a culture other than the one you were born into. You can select ancestry feats from the chosen ancestry, in addition to your own.

name: Canny Acumen
description: Your avoidance or observation is beyond the ken of most of your kind. Choose Fortitude saves, Reflex saves, Will saves, or Perception. You become an expert in the chosen statistic.

name: Ride
description: When you Command an Animal you're riding, you succeed automatically unless the animal is spooked or otherwise has reason to resist. If you have the Ride skill, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus when the animal is hostile.

name: Train Animal
description: You teach a domesticated animal a trick. Training an animal requires 7 days of work and a successful Nature check.

name: Reach Spell
trigger: You Cast a Spell with a range of touch, 15 feet, or 30 feet.
description: You can extend the range of your spells. If the spell has a range of touch, it changes to 30 feet. If the spell has a range of 15 or 30 feet, it increases by 30 feet.

name: Widen Spell
trigger: You Cast a Spell with an area of a burst, cone, or line.
description: You manipulate the energy of your spell, causing it to spread out and affect a wider area. Increase the spell's area by 5 feet (burst, emanation) or 10 feet (cone or line).

name: Cantrip Expansion
description: A greater understanding of your magic broadens your range of simple spells. Add two additional cantrips from your spell list to your repertoire or prepared spell slots.

name: Animal Companion
description: You gain the service of a young animal companion that travels with you on your adventures. You can choose from the standard animal companion options as long as your companion is of an appropriate type.

name: Battle Medicine
description: You can patch up wounds, even in the thick of combat. You attempt a Medicine check to Treat Wounds and restore Hit Points, but you don't need healer's tools. Your target is temporarily immune for 1 day.

name: Bon Mot
description: You launch a witty quip at a foe, catching it off guard. Attempt a Diplomacy check against the target's Will DC. On success, the target takes –2 to Perception and Will saves for 1 minute.

name: Cat Fall
description: Your catlike agility allows you to cushion your falls. Treat falls as 10 feet shorter. If you're an expert, treat as 25 feet shorter; master, 50 feet; legendary, always land on your feet.

name: Pickpocket
description: You can filch small objects from others without the noticing. You can Steal or Palm an Object even if you are observed, provided the object is small enough to fit in one hand.

name: Intimidating Glare
description: You can Demoralize with a mere glare. When you Demoralize using only a gesture or expression (no verbal component), you don't take the –4 penalty for attempting to Demoralize a creature that doesn't understand your language.

name: Forager
description: While using Survival to Subsist, if you roll any result worse than a success, you get a success. On a success, you can provide subsistence for yourself and four additional creatures.

name: Hobnobber
description: You are skilled at learning information through conversation. Gather Information in half the usual time. If you're a master, reduce time to one-quarter.

name: Lie to Me
description: You can use Deception to detect lies. When you Sense Motive to see if someone is lying, use Deception instead of Perception.

name: Kip Up
trigger: You are prone and your turn begins.
description: You can spring to your feet as a free action. Standing up no longer triggers reactions.

name: Assurance
description: Even in difficult circumstances, you can perform basic tasks. For the chosen skill, you can forgo rolling to take the result of 10 + your proficiency modifier without adding any bonuses, penalties, or modifiers.

name: Titan Wrestler
description: You can attempt to Disarm, Grapple, Shove, or Trip creatures up to two sizes larger than you.

name: Alchemical Familiar
description: You have created a familiar, a Tiny creature magically linked to you. Your familiar is an alchemical construct and gains additional abilities from your Chirurgeon, Mutagenist, or Toxicologist research field.

name: Far Lobber
description: You've learned how to throw your bombs in a higher arc, increasing their range. You have a range increment of 60 feet with bombs instead of the standard 20 feet.

name: Quick Bomber
description: You keep your bombs in easy reach and can draw and throw them with blinding speed. As part of the Strike action to throw a bomb, you can draw the bomb.

name: Precise Bombs
description: Whenever you throw an alchemical bomb with a splash effect, you can designate a number of targets in the splash area equal to your Intelligence modifier. Creatures you designate aren't affected by the splash damage.

name: Smoke Bomb
trigger: You throw an alchemical bomb.
description: You combine a smokestick with your bomb, creating a massive cloud of smoke. The bomb also creates a cloud of smoke in a 10-foot burst centered on where it hit.

name: Acute Vision
description: When you are raging, your visual acuity improves, granting you darkvision.

name: Moment of Clarity
description: You push back the haze of rage. You can use concentrate actions requiring the concentrate trait while raging, as long as you do so during the action during which you use this ability.

name: Raging Intimidation
description: Your fury fills your enemies with fear. While you are raging, you can use the Demoralize action, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks to Demoralize.

name: Raging Thrower
description: Thrown weapons become especially deadly in your rage. You can use Athletics instead of your attack modifier to throw a weapon, and you add your Rage damage to thrown weapon damage.

name: Sudden Charge
description: With a single mighty sprint, you close the gap between you and your foe. You Stride twice. If you end your movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, you can make a melee Strike against that enemy.

name: Lingering Composition
description: By adding a flourish, you extend the benefits of your composition. If your next action is to cast a cantrip composition, attempt a Performance check. On success, the spell's duration extends to 2 rounds; on critical success, 3 rounds.

name: Versatile Performance
description: Your diverse training allows you to use your Performance skill in place of Diplomacy to Make an Impression or Deception to Create a Distraction.

name: Counter Performance
trigger: You or an ally within 60 feet rolls a save against an auditory or visual effect.
description: Your performance protects allies against auditory and visual effects. Roll a Performance check and use the result instead of the saving throw.

name: Occult Breadth
description: Your understanding of occult magic has grown. You can learn one additional spell from your spell repertoire each time you gain a level.

name: Inspire Heroics
description: You can inspire yourself or an ally to perform beyond their limits. Spend 3 Focus Points; the target gains a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, saves, and skill checks for 1 minute.

name: Ranged Reprisal
description: You can use Retributive Strike with a ranged weapon. In addition, if the foe that triggered your reaction is within 5 feet of you, you can Step before making your Strike.

name: Unimpeded Step
description: Your divine connection allows you to move easily through difficult terrain. Your Step is not hampered by difficult terrain.

name: Weight of Guilt
description: Your divine condemnation weighs upon those who wrong your allies. When you use Glimpse of Redemption, the enemy also becomes stupefied 2 until the start of your next turn.

name: Divine Grace
trigger: You attempt a saving throw.
description: You call upon your deity's grace to resist an effect. Gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the triggering saving throw.

name: Selective Sanctification
description: You can choose which creatures are affected by your sanctification. When you sanctify something, you can exclude a number of creatures up to your Charisma modifier from the effect.

name: Communal Healing
description: Healing magic flows through you to benefit others as well as your target. When you cast a heal spell targeting only one ally, you restore 1d6 Hit Points to yourself.

name: Healing Hands
description: Your healing magic is especially effective. When you cast the heal spell, the Hit Points restored increase by 2 per spell rank.

name: Channel Smite
description: You siphon the destructive energy of your font through a weapon Strike. You spend a harm or heal spell slot; on a hit, add the spell's damage or healing as extra damage against the target.

name: Cast Down
description: Your harmful font can blast foes off their feet. When you deal damage with a harm spell, you can make the target fall prone (DC equals your spell DC).

name: Divine Weapon
trigger: Your turn ends.
description: You channel divine power into your weapon. Your weapon or unarmed attack gains the holy or unholy rune, depending on your alignment with holy or unholy sanctification.

name: Storm Born
description: You feel equally at home in tempests as in clear skies. You don't take the –2 circumstance penalty to ranged attacks caused by non-magical wind, and you ignore concealment caused by rain and fog.

name: Warden's Step
description: You tread lightly in natural places. You don't trigger reactions from animals, beasts, and plants when you move, unless you're in combat.

name: Thousand Faces
description: Your connection with nature is so strong that you can take on different forms with ease. You can use Wild Shape more flexibly, taking on humanoid shapes among your available forms.

name: Elemental Shape
description: You can use Wild Shape to transform into an elemental form, using the elemental forms as options for your transformation.

name: Leshy Familiar
description: You gain a leshy familiar, a Tiny plant creature that is magically linked to you. Your leshy familiar gains additional abilities from your leaf order.

name: Double Slice
description: You lash out with both weapons simultaneously. Make one Strike with each of your two melee weapons, each using your current multiple attack penalty, then add 2 to your penalty for your next attack.

name: Exacting Strike
description: You make a precise attack. Make a Strike. This has the press trait. If this Strike fails or critically fails, it does not count for your multiple attack penalty.

name: Power Attack
description: You unleash a particularly powerful attack that clobbers your foe. Make a melee Strike. It counts as two attacks for the multiple attack penalty. If this Strike hits, you deal an extra die of weapon damage.

name: Reactive Shield
trigger: An enemy hits you with a melee Strike.
description: You can snap your shield into place just as you would be hit. Raise your Shield. The shield's bonus applies against the triggering attack.

name: Snagging Strike
description: You combine an attack with a quick maneuver. Make a Strike while keeping one hand free. If you hit, the target is flat-footed against your next attack this round.

name: Known Weaknesses
description: When you use Recall Knowledge about a creature you've pursued as a lead, you also discover one of the creature's weaknesses, if it has any.

name: Shared Stratagem
description: You share your strategic insights with your allies. When you use Devise a Stratagem, you can designate one ally to also gain the benefit of your stratagem against the same target.

name: Underworld Investigator
description: You've picked up some tricks from less lawful acquaintances. Add Underworld Lore to your list of additional skills for Devise a Stratagem.

name: Athletic Strategist
description: You apply your knowledge of anatomy and physics to athletic endeavors. You can use your Intelligence modifier in place of Strength or Dexterity for Athletics checks.

name: Pursue a Lead
description: You closely examine the details of one potential clue, designating a single object, location, or creature as a lead. You gain special benefits when investigating this lead.

name: Arcane Cascade
description: You enter a state of magical readiness. You can't cast spells while in this stance, but your melee Strikes deal 1 additional damage of the spell's trait, increasing to 2 at 7th level and 3 at 15th level.

name: Force Fang
trigger: You use Spellstrike.
description: You transform the magic of your spell into pure force. Your Spellstrike deals force damage instead of its normal damage type, and the spell is expended.

name: Shielded Casting
description: You've learned to cast while defending yourself. You can Raise your Shield as a free action at the start of casting a spell, then use the spell normally.

name: Expansive Spellstrike
description: You widen the scope of your Spellstrike. Your Spellstrike can work with spells that have a range rather than requiring touch, targeting the creature you hit with the Strike.

name: Spell Swipe
description: You can cleave through foes with your Spellstrike. Your Spellstrike can target two adjacent creatures you threaten, making one Strike and one spell attack against each.

name: Crane Stance
description: You enter the stance of a crane, a style that wards off attacks. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and a crane wing unarmed attack dealing 1d6 bludgeoning that has the finesse and nonlethal traits.

name: Dragon Stance
description: You enter the stance of a dragon. You gain dragon claws (2d6 slashing, agile, unarmed). You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to Shove.

name: Ki Rush
description: You can use ki to speed your movement. Spend 1 Focus Point; Stride once and gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed until the end of your current turn.

name: Stunning Fist
description: The focused power of your flurry can stun your enemy. When you Flurry of Blows, you can attempt to Stun your target. The target must succeed at a Fortitude save (DC = your class DC) or be stunned 1.

name: Tiger Stance
description: You enter the stance of a tiger. You gain tiger claws (1d8 slashing, agile, deadly d12, unarmed). While in tiger stance you can Step 10 feet.

name: Domain Acumen
description: Your study of your mystery deepens your understanding of your divine domain. Select one domain that matches your mystery. You gain the initial domain spell for that domain.

name: Glean Lore
description: You have access to obscure divine knowledge. You can Recall Knowledge about divine, occult, and esoteric subjects using Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion.

name: Vision of Weakness
description: You gain a flash of oracular insight about a creature's weakness. Attempt a Perception check vs a creature's Will DC; on success learn one of its weaknesses or immunities.

name: Bespell Weapon
trigger: You cast a non-cantrip spell.
description: You siphon magical power into your weapon. Your first melee Strike this round deals additional damage based on the spell's rank (1–2: +1d6, 3–4: +2d6, 5–6: +3d6, 7–8: +4d6, 9–10: +5d6).

name: Prophesize
description: You utter a short prophecy that comes true. You grant an ally a +2 status bonus on the first check they attempt before the start of your next turn.

name: Amp Cantrip
description: You expend psychic resonance to power up a cantrip. Spend 1 Focus Point when you cast a cantrip; the cantrip gains the amped trait and an enhanced effect based on which cantrip you choose.

name: Distant Mindscape
description: Your mindscape extends farther than normal. When you use Distant Grasp, you can extend the reach to 60 feet.

name: Psychic Blast
description: You unleash a blast of psychic energy. You deal 2d6 mental damage per spell rank to creatures in a 30-foot cone, with a basic Will save against your spell DC.

name: Sensory Bypass
description: Your psychic abilities allow you to sense things through unconventional means. You gain a limited form of the tremorsense ability out to 15 feet while you are Sustaining a Spell.

name: Thought Override
description: You overwhelm a foe's mind with psychic static. A creature within 30 feet must succeed at a Will save (DC = your spell DC) or be stunned 1 (stunned 2 on critical failure).

name: Hunted Shot
description: You take two quick shots against your hunted prey. Make two Strikes against your hunted prey with a ranged weapon. These count as one attack for the multiple attack penalty, calculated after both attacks.

name: Monster Hunter
description: You've studied your enemies to better combat them. When you critically succeed at Recall Knowledge about a creature type associated with a Hunt Prey target, all allies gain a +1 status bonus to attack and damage against that creature.

name: Twin Takedown
description: You attack simultaneously with both weapons against your hunted prey. Make one Strike with each of your two melee weapons against your hunted prey. Calculate the MAP normally.

name: Warden's Boon
description: You pass your hunting knowledge to your allies. You share your Hunt Prey benefits with one ally who can see and hear you, granting them your precision damage and other hunt prey bonuses against your quarry.

name: Relentless Pursuit
trigger: Your hunted prey attempts to Move away from you.
description: You pursue your quarry with dogged determination. Stride toward your prey; if you end your movement adjacent to it, the prey is flat-footed until your next turn.

name: Nimble Dodge
trigger: A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.
description: You deftly dodge out of the way. Gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

name: Opportune Backstab
trigger: An enemy is hit by a melee attack from your ally.
description: When an adjacent enemy is struck by an ally, you take the opportunity to strike from the other side. Make a melee Strike against the triggering enemy.

name: Poison Weapon
description: You apply a toxin to your weapon. Apply a poison to one melee weapon or piece of ammunition. You can draw and apply the poison simultaneously.

name: Trap Finder
description: You have an eye for trap placement. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find traps, to AC and saves against traps, and to Thievery checks to disable traps.

name: Dread Striker
description: Fear makes your foes' defenses drop. Your Strikes against frightened creatures gain the backstabber trait, and frightened creatures are flat-footed against your Strikes.

name: Dangerous Sorcery
description: Your legacy lends power to your destructive magic. When you cast a non-cantrip non-focus spell that deals damage, you deal extra damage equal to the spell's rank.

name: Sorcerer's Shrapnel
description: Your spells carry a remnant of elemental power. Whenever you critically hit with a spell, creatures adjacent to the target take 1d6 splash damage of the corresponding elemental type.

name: Bloodline Resistance
description: Your bloodline manifests as an innate resilience. You gain a +1 status bonus to saves against effects that match your bloodline's tradition.

name: Greater Bloodline
description: Your bloodline deepens. You gain an additional 5th rank spell slot and expand your blood magic's additional effect.

name: Sicken Foe
description: Your mental magic leaves foes reeling. When you hit a creature with a spell that deals mental damage, the creature is sickened 1 (no save).

name: Link Spells
description: You channel spells through your eidolon. When you cast a spell that targets your eidolon, you can have the spell affect you instead, or vice versa, as long as you are within 30 feet of each other.

name: Reinforce Eidolon
description: You focus your shared power into your eidolon's defense. Your eidolon gains resistance 3 to physical damage until the start of your next turn. At 5th level increase to 5, at 9th to 7.

name: Eidolon's Opportunity
trigger: A creature within your eidolon's reach uses a manipulate action.
description: Your eidolon punishes foes who let their guard down. Your eidolon makes a Strike against the triggering creature.

name: Ostentatious Arrival
description: Your eidolon makes a grand entrance. When you Manifest your Eidolon, your eidolon immediately Strides up to its Speed as a free action, and you can have it make a Strike at the end of this movement.

name: Tandem Strike
description: You and your eidolon work in perfect tandem. When you cast a spell and your eidolon Strikes the same target in the same round, both gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the attack roll and spell attack roll.

name: Confident Finisher
description: You make an elegant finishing strike. Make a Strike. If you hit and have panache, add a finishing flourish dealing your precise strike damage.

name: Fancy Move
description: You follow up a Tumble Through with flashy footwork. When you successfully Tumble Through, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your next attack roll made before the end of your turn.

name: Flying Blade
description: You send a thrown blade in a tight arc. Make a thrown weapon Strike. If you have panache and the target is within your first range increment, add your precise strike damage.

name: Swaggering Initiative
description: You swagger with confidence at the start of encounters. When you roll initiative, you can use Diplomacy or Intimidation instead of Perception. If you get panache from the trigger, keep it.

name: Dueling Parry
description: You can use your one-handed melee weapon to parry attacks. While wielding a single one-handed melee weapon with your other hand free, gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC.

name: Esoteric Antithesis
description: Your esoteric lore reveals a weakness. When you Recall Knowledge about a creature and succeed, you learn one weakness or immunity. You can exploit this weakness with your weapons to deal extra damage equal to half the creature's rank.

name: Root to Life
description: You reach into another plane to sustain an ally's life. An adjacent ally that has the dying condition decreases their dying condition by 1.

name: Talisman Dabbler
description: You've dabbled in the art of creating and using talismans. You can affix and activate talismans without triggering a higher DC, and you gain an additional talisman slot.

name: Implement's Interruption
trigger: An enemy within reach casts a spell.
description: Your implement lashes out to interrupt an enemy's magic. Make a Strike against the triggering creature. On a hit, the creature must succeed at a flat check (DC 5 + spell rank) or the spell is disrupted.

name: Diverse Lore
description: Your research into the esoteric spans all fields. You can Recall Knowledge using Occultism for any topic, including those normally covered by other skills.

name: Cackle
trigger: Your turn ends.
description: With a quick cackle, you sustain a hex. The duration of any hex you have active that normally ends at the end of your turn is extended until the end of your next turn.

name: Cauldron
description: You have an innate talent for creating magical compounds. During your daily preparations, you can brew a number of potions equal to your Intelligence modifier using standard alchemical formulae.

name: Familiar's Face
description: You send your familiar out to be your eyes and ears. As long as your familiar is within 100 feet, you can see and hear through its senses instead of your own.

name: Needle of Vengeance
description: You magically mark a target to suffer retribution. A foe that harms an ally is immediately struck by a needle of force for 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier piercing damage, no save.

name: Basic Lesson
description: You learned a new lesson from your patron. Gain an additional lesson hex spell, and add one spell to your familiar's repertoire from the associated spell list.

name: Counterspell
trigger: A creature casts a spell that you have prepared.
description: When a foe casts a spell you have prepared, you can expend a prepared spell to counter it. You must expend a prepared spell of the same rank. The triggering spell is disrupted on a success.

name: Eschew Materials
description: You can cast spells without material components. You can cast any of your spells that require material components as if they didn't require them.

name: Hand of the Apprentice
description: You can launch your held weapon with telekinetic force. Spend 1 Focus Point; make a Strike with a melee weapon you're holding using your spell attack modifier, and the weapon returns to your hand.

name: Spell Mastery
description: You have mastered five spells of each rank up to 9th. Select one spell of each rank 1–9. These spells are always considered prepared, even if you didn't include them in your preparation.

name: Bespell Strikes
trigger: You cast a non-cantrip spell.
description: Your next melee Strike gains a bonus depending on the spell's rank (1–2: +1d6, 3–4: +2d6, 5–6: +3d6, 7–8: +4d6, 9–10: +5d6) matching the spell's tradition.

name: Dwarven Lore
description: You have studied the history, culture, and underground secrets of dwarven society. You become trained in Crafting and Religion, and you gain the Dwarven Lore specialty.

name: Dwarven Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons used by your dwarven ancestors. You are trained with the battle axe, pick, and warhammer, and you gain access to all uncommon dwarf weapons.

name: Rock Runner
description: Your innate connection to stone allows you to run across uneven surfaces with ease. You can ignore difficult terrain from stone and earth, and you're not flat-footed on uneven rocky ground.

name: Stonecunning
description: You have a knack for noticing stonework irregularities. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find hidden stonework doors, unusual stonework, and concealed stone traps.

name: Unburdened Iron
description: You've learned to move in armor as naturally as others move without it. Reduce the Speed penalty from medium and heavy armor by 5 feet. If the penalty would be 0, you don't take any penalty.

name: Ancestral Linguistics
description: Your long life has granted you many opportunities to learn languages. Each time you gain this feat, choose an additional language to know.

name: Elven Lore
description: You've absorbed elven culture and history. You become trained in Arcana and Nature, and you gain the Elven Lore specialty.

name: Elven Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor the elegant weapons of elven tradition. You are trained with longbows, composite longbows, longswords, rapiers, shortbows, and composite shortbows, plus uncommon elf weapons.

name: Nimble Elf
description: Your muscles are fast and twitchy. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

name: Otherworldly Magic
description: Your elven magic manifests as a cantrip. Choose one cantrip from the arcane spell list. You can cast it as an arcane innate spell at will. Use your Intelligence as your spellcasting modifier.

name: Animal Accomplice
description: Your gnome curiosity and charm have endeared you to a small animal. You gain a familiar using the standard rules for familiars.

name: Gnome Obsession
description: You've focused on one area of study to the exclusion of much else. You become trained in a Lore skill of your choice, and become expert in it at 7th level.

name: Gnome Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons traditional to gnomes. You are trained with glaives, kukris, and all uncommon gnome weapons.

name: Razzle-Dazzle
description: When you blind or dazzle a creature, the effect lasts longer than normal. Increase the duration of any blinded or dazzled conditions you impose by 1 round.

name: First World Magic
description: Your connection to the fey realm grants you innate magic. Choose one primal cantrip. You can cast it as a primal innate spell at will, using Charisma as your spellcasting modifier.

name: Burn It!
description: Fire is beautiful, and you love it. Your spells and alchemical items that deal fire damage deal extra fire damage equal to half your level (minimum 1).

name: City Scavenger
description: You know the value of refuse and can find good materials in places others overlook. You can use Society instead of Survival to Subsist in a city, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus on that check.

name: Goblin Lore
description: You've picked up the basics of goblin culture. You become trained in Nature and Stealth, and gain the Goblin Lore specialty.

name: Goblin Scuttle
trigger: An ally ends their movement adjacent to you.
description: You take advantage of your small stature. Step once.

name: Razor Teeth
description: Your sharp teeth are particularly well-suited for combat. Your jaws are a finesse unarmed attack dealing 1d6 piercing damage.

name: Distracting Shadows
description: You use the shadows of larger creatures to conceal yourself. You can use larger creatures as cover to Hide, so long as you are adjacent to them.

name: Halfling Lore
description: You've picked up skills and knowledge passed down through halfling generations. You become trained in Acrobatics and Stealth, and gain the Halfling Lore specialty.

name: Halfling Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor small weapons traditional to halflings. You are trained with slings, halfling sling staves, and shortswords, plus all uncommon halfling weapons.

name: Titan Slinger
description: Your sling is powerful enough to take on much larger foes. When you hit a creature two or more sizes larger than you with a sling, increase the damage die to d8.

name: Halfling Luck
trigger: You fail a skill check or saving throw.
description: Your innate luck catches you when you fall. Reroll the triggering check, keeping the second result even if worse.

name: Cooperative Nature
description: The short human lifespan gives you perspective that makes you work well with others. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to checks to Aid.

name: General Training
description: Your adaptability manifests as a knack for picking up a wide variety of skills. You gain a 1st-level general feat of your choice.

name: Haughty Obstinacy
description: Your powerful force of will can make you difficult to command. Enemies don't gain bonuses from multiple Demoralize or Coerce attempts. You get an extra success at Recall Knowledge after losing Pursue a Lead.

name: Natural Ambition
description: You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, making you inclined to strive with every ounce of effort. Gain a 1st-level class feat from your class's feat list.

name: Unconventional Weaponry
description: You've trained with a weapon uncommon to your region, culture, or ancestry. You gain training with an uncommon weapon of your choice.

name: Grasping Reach
description: Your body grows sinuous vines that extend your reach. Your melee unarmed Strikes gain reach, allowing you to attack creatures up to 10 feet away.

name: Leshy Superstition
description: Fey have long been hostile to your people. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against fey, and if you succeed on a save you otherwise would have failed, you can use your reaction to step.

name: Speak with Kindred
description: You can speak with plants of the same kind as your body. You can ask questions and receive simple answers from plant creatures of the appropriate type.

name: Ritual Reversion
description: You can quickly transform between your mask and your plant body. You can transform to or from your mask appearance as a single action, rather than as part of a longer ritual.

name: Verdant Companion
description: You grow a smaller version of yourself as a familiar. This leshy familiar uses the standard familiar rules and grows in a pot or planter that you carry.

name: Hold Mark
description: You bear the marks of your heritage and use them to endure. You gain 1 additional Hit Point per level. Your wounds close slightly faster; reduce the persistent damage you take from bleeding by 1.

name: Orc Ferocity
trigger: You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points.
description: Your body holds tightly to life. Once per day, if you would be knocked out, remain at 1 HP instead.

name: Orc Lore
description: You know the legends and ways of orc warriors. You become trained in Athletics and Survival, and gain the Orc Lore specialty.

name: Orc Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons used by your orc ancestors. You are trained with the falchion, greataxe, and all uncommon orc weapons.

name: Tusks
description: Your tusks are well-developed. Your jaws are a finesse unarmed attack dealing 1d6 piercing damage.

name: Cat's Luck
trigger: You fail a Reflex save.
description: You can use your ancestry's luck to avoid danger. Once per day, reroll a failed Reflex save, keeping the second result even if it's worse.

name: Catfolk Lore
description: You were raised in a traditional catfolk enclave. You become trained in Acrobatics and Survival, and gain the Catfolk Lore specialty.

name: Catfolk Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons used by catfolk. You are trained with the claw blade, kukri, and all uncommon catfolk weapons.

name: Pride Hunter
description: You excel at hunting alongside your allies. Whenever you Aid an ally's attack roll, you deal additional damage equal to your level on their hit.

name: Focused Catfolk
description: You hone your attention to a razor's edge. You become expert in Perception, and you can never be surprised during exploration.

name: Fetchling Lore
description: Your time spent between planes gives you unusual knowledge. You become trained in Arcana and Stealth, and gain the Fetchling Lore specialty.

name: Liminal Sight
description: Your eyes adjust to see in the boundary between planes. You gain low-light vision. If you already have low-light vision, you gain darkvision instead.

name: Eidolon of the Void
description: You carry a piece of the Shadow Plane within you, granting you resistance to negative damage equal to half your level (minimum 1).

name: Shadow Blending
description: Dim light is a second home to you. When you are in dim light and succeed at a Stealth check to Hide, you can immediately Step as a free action.

name: Fetch's Fall
description: You draw on the Shadow Plane to cushion your falls. Treat all falls as 20 feet shorter. At 5th level, treat as 40 feet shorter; at 9th, you always land on your feet.

name: Draconic Sycophant
description: You've learned to use dragon psychology to your advantage. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception and Diplomacy checks when dealing with a dragon type matching your draconic exemplar.

name: Kobold Lore
description: You know the secrets of kobold society. You become trained in Crafting and Stealth, and gain the Kobold Lore specialty.

name: Kobold Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons used by kobolds. You are trained with the greatpick, light pick, and all uncommon kobold weapons.

name: Scamper
description: You've learned how to flee faster than any predator. When you Stride or Step, if you end your movement adjacent to a wall or obstacle, you gain a +10-foot status bonus to your next Stride that turn.

name: Snare Setter
description: You've learned how to set simple snares. You can craft a snare as a 1-minute activity (versus 1 hour normally) and without the need for a Crafting check.

name: Cheek Pouches
description: You have extra space in your cheeks to store small items. You can store up to four light items in your cheek pouches and Interact to stow or draw an item from them as a free action.

name: Ratfolk Lore
description: You have the knowledge of the warrens. You become trained in Crafting and Stealth, and gain the Ratfolk Lore specialty.

name: Ratfolk Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons used by ratfolk. You are trained with the dagger, shortsword, and all uncommon ratfolk weapons.

name: Rat Familiar
description: You have a particularly intelligent rat as a familiar. Gain a familiar using the standard rules; it must be a rat, but it gains two additional familiar abilities.

name: Skulk
description: You're particularly good at sneaking past foes. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks when in dim light, and don't require movement to be concealed when stationary.

name: Eat Fortune
trigger: You would gain the misfortune trait.
description: You try to consume a misfortune effect. Attempt a Fortitude save (DC 20). On success, you negate the misfortune effect; on critical success, you also gain the fortune trait on the same roll.

name: Mariner's Fire
description: You've mastered the magical fire of your ancestors. You can cast electric arc as an innate arcane cantrip, using Charisma as your spellcasting modifier.

name: Tengu Lore
description: You've picked up the culture and traditions of your people. You become trained in Acrobatics and Intimidation, and gain the Tengu Lore specialty.

name: Tengu Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons used by tengu. You are trained with the katana, kukri, and all uncommon tengu weapons.

name: Uncanny Agility
description: You have preternatural balance. You are never flat-footed when balancing, and you treat all narrow surfaces as firm ground for the purposes of movement.
